authselect_test_framework.hosts.client

Client multihost host.

Classes

ClientHost(*args, **kwargs)

Authselect client host object.
class authselect_test_framework.hosts.client.ClientHost(*args, **kwargs)

Bases: BaseHost, BaseLinuxHost

Authselect client host object.

Provides features specific to the test client.

Note

Full backup and restore of client identity state is supported, including SSSD and winbind/Samba configuration.

Parameters:

  • auto_start – Automatically start service before taking the first backup.

  • auto_restore (bool, optional) – If True, the host is automatically restored to the backup state when a test is finished in teardown(), defaults to True

sssd_service_user: str

SSSD service user configured by default install

authselect_backup: str | None

Authselect backup name created during a test.

authselect_track_backup(name: str) → None

Remember authselect backup name for per-test restore in teardown().

stop_identity_services() → None

Stop identity services configured by tests.

pytest_setup() → None

Start the services via start() and take a backup by calling backup().

setup() → None

Back up /home before each test so it can be restored in teardown().

teardown() → None

Restore the host from the backup by calling restore().

property features: dict[str, bool]

Features supported by the host.

start() → None

Not supported.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – _description_

stop() → None

Stop required services.

Raises:

NotImplementedError – If stop operation is not supported.

backup() → Any

Backup client identity and auth configuration.

Returns:

Backup data.

Return type:

Any

restore(backup_data: Any | None) → None

Restore client identity and auth configuration.

Returns:

Backup data.

Return type:

Any
